id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID with full name, photo, and signature.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or electronic devices. Scratch paper or whiteboard provided. No breaks for most exams; timer continues during any unscheduled break.
renewal_options: Earn Continuing Education (CE) credits, pass any Associate or higher exam, pass any technology core exam, or pass a Professional or Specialist exam. Credits tracked on cisco.com.

retake_policy.notes: 5-day waiting period before retaking the same exam. After 3 failed attempts, 180-day waiting period. No limit on total attempts.

official_study_resources.title: Cisco U (Cisco Learning Network)
official_study_resources.notes: Official Cisco training platform with free and paid content
